theme.ja: コーヒーを持って散歩している人
theme.basePromptEn: A single person walking outside while holding a takeaway coffee cup, full body visible, clear walking pose, one hand holding a lidded paper coffee cup, simple outdoor street setting, relaxed morning mood, casual outfit, no extra main characters
mustContain: takeaway coffee cup held in one hand

styles.labelJa: ナイーブ／ワブリー手描き

visualFingerprint.line: uneven hand-drawn outlines, visible wobble, casual sketch pressure
visualFingerprint.shape: playful asymmetry, simplified anatomy, intentionally imperfect proportions
visualFingerprint.color: light backgrounds with a few cheerful accent colors
visualFingerprint.texture: handmade editorial drawing, not polished vector, mostly flat color
visualFingerprint.composition: loose spacing, small narrative objects, charming irregular balance
visualFingerprint.person: rough human figure, simplified face, expressive posture over correct anatomy

promptFragments: flat colors on an off-white background

improvementRules.tooClean: Add: rough uneven contour lines, imperfect sketch marks, intentionally asymmetric face and hands.
improvementRules.tooRealistic: Add: flat naive drawing, no realistic anatomy, no camera lens effects.
improvementRules.tooCorporate: Remove: corporate vector, geometric precision. Add: handmade editorial zine illustration.
improvementRules.tooBusy: Reduce background detail; keep one person, one cup, a few walking cues.

styles.labelJa: グレイン入りフラット

visualFingerprint.line: clean simple contours with restrained linework
visualFingerprint.shape: flat simplified shapes, readable silhouettes, low to medium detail
visualFingerprint.color: muted palette with soft contrast, occasional strong blue or warm accent
visualFingerprint.texture: visible paper grain, subtle noisy vector texture, matte surface
visualFingerprint.composition: clear focal object, generous negative space, calm editorial layout
visualFingerprint.person: simplified character, minimal facial detail, accessible SaaS/editorial tone

promptFragments: visible paper grain and subtle noise overlay across every shape

improvementRules.grainWeak: Add: visible paper grain across flat color areas, subtle print noise, matte finish.
improvementRules.tooDetailed: Add: simplified silhouettes, fewer folds, fewer background elements.
improvementRules.tooFlatNoTexture: Increase texture words; add grain to both figure and background.
improvementRules.tooDark: Use light off-white or pale tinted background and restrained contrast.

styles.labelJa: 印刷・版画（リソ／リノカット／木版）

visualFingerprint.line: bold carved marks, ink-like edges, rough printed contours
visualFingerprint.shape: poster-like flat blocks, cutout silhouettes, simplified high-contrast forms
visualFingerprint.color: limited spot-color palette, black plus red/pink/yellow/teal, off-white paper
visualFingerprint.texture: risograph grain, linocut or woodblock texture, ink misregistration
visualFingerprint.composition: strong graphic layout, print poster energy, deliberate color separation
visualFingerprint.person: reduced to bold readable shapes, expressive silhouette rather than detailed face

promptFragments: visible halftone dots and ink grain

improvementRules.tooSmooth: Add: rough ink edges, visible print texture, imperfect registration.
improvementRules.tooManyColors: Limit to 2-4 spot colors plus paper and black.
improvementRules.tooDelicate: Use bold carved shapes and high contrast instead of thin outlines.
improvementRules.tooDigital: Add: risograph overprint, halftone grain, handmade poster print.

styles.labelJa: エディトリアル・アウトライン

visualFingerprint.line: thin monoline outline, sparse continuous line feeling, restrained black strokes
visualFingerprint.shape: minimal geometric simplification, light symbolic forms, little filled area
visualFingerprint.color: mostly white or very pale background, one small accent color
visualFingerprint.texture: clean digital line art, almost no texture, no heavy grain
visualFingerprint.composition: large whitespace, airy layout, editorial restraint
visualFingerprint.person: gender-neutral simplified figure, minimal face, gesture-led communication

promptFragments: only one or two small accent color fills

improvementRules.tooFilled: Remove filled color blocks; keep mostly thin outlines and one accent.
improvementRules.tooBusy: Increase whitespace; reduce scene to person, cup, walking cue.
improvementRules.tooTextured: Remove grain, paper texture, painterly rendering.
improvementRules.tooGeneric: Add: editorial column illustration, refined monoline, sparse visual metaphor.

styles.labelJa: フラットベクター（コーポレート）

visualFingerprint.line: clean vector edges, optional thin support lines, crisp geometry
visualFingerprint.shape: geometric simplified forms, modular UI-like composition, high readability
visualFingerprint.color: controlled corporate palette with blue, orange, black, pale backgrounds
visualFingerprint.texture: smooth vector surfaces, no grain, no painterly artifacts
visualFingerprint.composition: balanced commercial layout, clear hierarchy, presentation-ready
visualFingerprint.person: simple friendly character, minimal face, business or lifestyle readability

promptFragments: controlled blue and orange accent palette

improvementRules.tooHandmade: Add: crisp vector edges, geometric construction, smooth flat fills.
improvementRules.tooTextured: Remove grain and print texture; request clean scalable vector style.
improvementRules.tooPlain: Add a few interface-like or urban walking support shapes while preserving clarity.
improvementRules.tooDecorative: Prioritize business-friendly readability and simple hierarchy.
